body: What's the best time of year to visit Japan for cherry blossoms? I've heard timing is tricky.
Late March to mid April usually. It moves north — Tokyo blooms before Hokkaido. Check forecast sites closer to your trip.
I went in early April last year and caught peak bloom in Kyoto. The Philosopher's Path was stunning.
Are the crowds terrible during cherry blossom season? I'm a bit worried about that.
Popular spots are packed but worth it. Go early morning for photos. Hanami picnics under the trees are magical.
